inputs.label: Water Fill Depth (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Depth of water from the inside bottom glass to the water surface, in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth of water from the inside bottom glass to the water surface, in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İç taban camından su yüzeyine kadar olan su derinliği, santimetre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wassertiefe vom inneren Boden bis zur Wasseroberfläche in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur de l'eau depuis le verre inférieur intérieur jusqu'à la surface de l'eau, en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad del agua desde el fondo interior hasta la superficie, en centímetros.

inputs.label: Substrate Depth (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Average depth of substrate (sand, gravel) inside the aquarium, in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average depth of substrate (sand, gravel) inside the aquarium, in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akvaryum içindeki substratın (kum, çakıl) ortalama derinliği, santimetre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Höhe des Substrats (Sand, Kies) im Aquarium in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur moyenne du substrat (sable, gravier) à l'intérieur de l'aquarium, en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad media del sustrato (arena, grava) dentro del acuario, en centímetros.

inputs.label: Glass Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the glass panels used for the aquarium, in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the glass panels used for the aquarium, in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akvaryum için kullanılan cam panellerin kalınlığı, milimetre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dicke der Glasscheiben des Aquariums in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur des panneaux de verre utilisés pour l'aquarium, en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor de los paneles de vidrio utilizados para el acuario, en milímetros.

breakdown: interiorLength.toFixed(1) + ' × ' + interiorWidth.toFixed(1) + ' × ' + effectiveWaterDepth.toFixed(1) + ' cm (internal volume: ' + volume_cm3.toFixed(0) + ' cm³)'
